tracks.meaning: the periodic rise and fall of sea level caused by gravitational forces of the moon and sun
a tendency or general direction of events or affairs over a period of time
a flood or large amount of something arriving or overwhelming in succession
to carry someone or something along with a flow or current of events
to drift or be carried along by a current or force
any of various tidal cycles or patterns in living organisms synchronized with lunar or tidal rhythms
a regular cyclic change in atmospheric or environmental conditions linked to tidal forces
